message:
fix(types): complete TypeScript strictness fixes for 298 errors

- Fixed exactOptionalPropertyTypes violations across routes, services, and web
- Added conditional spreads pattern for optional properties
- Updated WebSocket channel types to include system:jobs and session:job
- Added job message types to MessageType union
- Fixed noUncheckedIndexedAccess issues with proper null checks
- Applied imperative property assignment where spreads failed

All files in:
- apps/gateway/src/routes/*
- apps/gateway/src/services/*
- apps/gateway/src/ws/*
- apps/gateway/src/__tests__/*
- apps/web/src/components/*
- apps/web/src/hooks/*

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
